title: Neighborhood pet-sitting marketplace
idea: A mobile marketplace where pet owners in the same apartment complex or neighborhood book last-minute dog walking and pet sitting from verified neighbors. Sitters get 80% of the fee; the platform takes 20%. Trust is built via government ID + video intro + first three bookings free for new sitters. No insurance partnership yet — owners waive liability in-app. Launch city is Jakarta high-rises only.
focus_notes: Take-rate vs neighbor disintermediation (go off-app after intro)
